steps.title: Support student engagement
steps.content: The underlined claim says hip-hop pedagogy encourages student success by raising students' interest and engagement. Strong support should show that students are choosing or attending courses with hip-hop and rap elements at high rates.

steps.title: Reject irrelevant evidence
steps.content: Choice A only compares enthusiasm for rap and hip-hop. Choice B concerns students interested in social justice, not success through engagement. Choice C focuses on educators' enjoyment rather than student interest or engagement. The answer is D.
